title: linaria virgata subsp. riffea
intro: Linaria virgata subsp. riffea, also known as the needle spurge or spurge flax, is a plant species within the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Linaria virgata subsp. riffea include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Linaria virgata subsp. riffea can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to harness its therapeutic properties.
